desc: Top view of two volcanic lakes.One of the best panoramic views in Bali.

name: Sekumpul Waterfall
desc: ⭐️ Majority's choice · Two powerful streams in the jungle from a height of 80m.The photo is the cover of National Geographic.

name: Okuta Cafe (vegan options)
desc: Western and Indonesian cuisine with a good selection of vegetarian options.View of Gunung Batur.

name: Munduk Moding Plantation (yoga classes)
desc: Luxury eco-resort with yoga shala.Morning classes overlooking the clouds and coffee plantation.Hatha, vinyasa.Also available to non-guests (by appointment).

name: Munduk Tentrem (Yoga Space)
desc: Yoga room in an eco-resort.Qualified instructors, stretching and meditation against the backdrop of Munduk nature.

name: Tira Vilagna Bali (Kintamani)
desc: Wellness retreat with yoga studio and mountain views.Hatha, Yin, Vinyasa.Morning classes at the Batur volcano.

name: Toya Devasya Hot Spring 🔥
desc: Luxury hot spring complex near Lake Batur.Several swimming pools of different temperatures, a water park, a restaurant.Volcanic water straight from the ground!

name: Air Panas Banjar (Banjar Hot Springs)
desc: Traditional Balinese thermal pools in a tropical garden.38°C, sulfur (healing!).Three levels of pools, stone dragons.There is a Buddhist monastery nearby.

name: Toteme Glamping Hot Spring
desc: Thermal pool in the glamping area.Free for guests, day visit possible.

name: Munduk Moding Plantation Spa
desc: Spa at luxury eco-resort.Balinese massage, coffee scrub, flower baths.Overlooking the clouds over the valley.

name: Mount Batur Sunrise 🔥
desc: Legendary sunrise on the volcano!Get up at 2-3 am, 2 hours of trekking.At the top there are clouds below, the sun rises over Agung.TOP 1 sunrise in Bali.

name: Cafe on the caldera (sunrise without trekking)
desc: Paperhills, Montana Del Cafe, Ritatkala - open at 5:30-6:00.Dawn over Batur with coffee in hand.For those who don't want to climb.

name: Twin Lakes Sunset
desc: Sunset over two volcanic lakes Buyan and Tamblingan.Viewpoint on the road between Bedugul and Munduk.Quiet, magical.

name: Pura Ulun Danu Beratan (sunset)
desc: Temple on the lake in the golden light of sunset.One of the most photogenic moments in Bali.Arrive an hour before closing (18:00).

name: Wanagiri Hidden Hills (golden hour)
desc: Swings over lakes in golden light.There are fewer queues after 15:00, and the light is better!

name: Bedugul Market (Pasar Candi Kuning) 🔥
desc: Huge mountain market!Fruits and vegetables at ridiculous prices: strawberries, passion fruit, mangosteen, rambutan, spices.Prices are 2-3 times lower than in the south.Locals come here to shop.

name: Paintings on volcanic sand
desc: A unique souvenir!Local artists create paintings from colored volcanic sand - Buddha, temples, landscapes.Sellers along the road in Kintamani.

name: Kintamani coffee (beans)
desc: Buy fresh beans directly from the plantation or from a cafe.Kintamani Arabica is one of the best coffees in the world.Great gift!

name: Souvenirs Munduk
desc: Spices (cloves, cinnamon, vanilla), oils, honey.Munduk is the spice center of Bali.Buy from local farmers.

name: Pasar Candi Kuning (Bedugul Market) 🔥
desc: The main food market of the north!Mountain fruits and vegetables at the best prices in Bali.Strawberries, passion fruit, corn, avocado, spices.Local restaurateurs from the south come to shop here.

name: Amok Sunset Bar
desc: Cafe with a view of the rocks.Coffee, smoothies, sunsets.🍽 Worth a try: Specialty coffee

name: Full Circle Cafe
desc: Specialty coffee on the island!Author's drinks, cozy atmosphere.🍽 Worth a try: Specialty coffee

name: Krisna Oleh-Oleh Singaraja
desc: Large souvenir store of the Krisna chain.Magnets, sarongs, Luwak coffee, spices, cosmetics - all in one place.Fixed prices.

name: Pasar Kintamani
desc: Local market in Kintamani.Small, but has everything for basic purchases: fruits, vegetables, rice, eggs, spices.

name: La Nusa Beach Club
desc: Beach club with swimming pool, seafood, cocktails.Rest between excursions.

name: Maruti Cliff Restaurant
desc: Restaurant on a cliff with panoramic views.Seafood, sunsets, romance.

name: Warung with tofu/tempeh
desc: In any warung you can order nasi champur without meat: tofu, tempeh, vegetables.

name: Toyapakeh Wall
desc: Wall with soft corals, giant gorgonians.Strong currents = lots of fish.

name: Freedive trips from Bali
desc: Schools from Amed and Canggu organize day trips to Penida for freedivers.Manta Bay Snorkeling with manta rays!They feed near the surface - visible with a mask.Unforgettable!

name: Wall Point
desc: Underwater wall.Snorkeling over the abyss - vertical corals.

name: Yoga at guesthouses
desc: Some hotels (La Nusa, Semabu Hills) offer morning yoga.100-150K.

name: Massage on the beach
desc: Balinese massage right on Crystal Bay.Simple, relaxing.

name: Seaweed Farms
desc: Seaweed farms are the island's main industry.You can watch the process and try it.

name: Pasar Sampalan
desc: The main market of the island is in the capital.Fruits, vegetables, fish.Morning.

name: Pura Paluang (T-Rex Temple)
desc: Temple on top of a cliff overlooking the T-Rex (Kelingking).An energetic place.

name: Underwater (manta rays)
desc: Corals, mola mola, giant manta rays at Manta Point.

name: The Pearl
desc: Fine dining on Gili T. Seafood, steaks, romantic atmosphere.One of the best restaurants on the islands.

name: Pituq Warung
desc: Local cuisine, fresh grilled seafood.Sunset view, reasonable prices.

name: Night Market (Pasar Malam)
desc: Night market next to the port.Grilled fish, satay, nasi goreng - from 25K.The cheapest place on the island!.🍽 Worth a try: Nasi goreng or nasi champur

name: Kayu Cafe
desc: Bowls, smoothies, healthy food.Insta vibe, good coffee.

name: Pituq Café
desc: Organic cafe overlooking Lombok.Plant-based menu, freshly squeezed juices, a completely zen atmosphere.

name: Warung Pondok
desc: Warung on the main road.Mi goreng, satay.Simple and delicious.

name: Manta Point
desc: Manta Ray cleaning station.Huge manta rays (span up to 5m) circle around you.One of the best dive sites in the world!

name: Manta Bay
desc: Another point with manta rays.Less crowded than Manta Point.Schools on Penida: Blue Corner Dive PADI 5-star on the island.Fun dives from 800K, Open Water from 6M.

name: Sanctum Dive Nusa Penida
desc: Professional center.Technical diving, rebreathers, safaris.

name: Freedive Nusa Penida
desc: AIDA courses on the island.Open water sessions + manta rays.Unique experience!

name: Gamat Bay
desc: Quiet bay with corals and turtles.Few people.

name: Pura Goa Giri Putri
desc: Temple inside a huge cave!Entrance is through a narrow gap in the rock.Mystical place.

name: Kelingking Beach
desc: ⭐️ Majority's choice · T-Rex rock - #1 photo of Bali!The view from the top is worth the trip.

name: Broken Beach
desc: Arch in the rock, turquoise pool inside.From above there is a panoramic view.

name: Angel\
desc: Natural infinity pool on the edge of a cliff.

name: Atuh Beach
desc: Rocks and white sand.Stunning hidden cove.

name: Thousand Islands Viewpoint
desc: Panorama of rocks - dozens of small islands.

name: Diamond Beach
desc: ⭐️ Majority's choice · Staircase in the rock to the white beach.Amazing descent.

name: Barefoot Blondie
desc: Best breakfast on Gili Air.Smoothie bowls, avocado toast, coffee.🍽 Worth a try: Eggs Benedict

name: Gili Coffee Roasters
desc: Specialty coffee + passion fruit cheesecake.The best coffee in all of the Gili.

name: Mahamaya Restaurant
desc: Restaurant at a boutique hotel.Seafood, cocktails, feet in the sand.

name: Sasak Cafe
desc: Local cuisine, cheap.Nasi champur, mi goreng.

name: Sunset Point (Gili T)
desc: West coast of Gili T - swings in the water, turquoise water, sunsets.The most photographed place on the island.

name: East Side Beach (Gili Air)
desc: Calm beach with views of Lombok and Mount Rinjani.The sunrises are amazing.

name: Gili Meno Beach (west)
desc: Snow-white sand, almost no one.An ideal beach for couples and singles.

name: Underwater Statues (Nest) — Gili Meno
desc: 48 underwater statues from sculptor Jason Taylor at a depth of 4m.Corals grow over the sculptures - every year they look new.You can swim from the shore!

name: Turtle Point — Gili Trawangan
desc: Green sea turtles swim right nearby.Visibility is excellent, depth 3-8m.Turtles are 100% guaranteed!

name: Coral Garden — Gili Air
desc: Healthy coral reefs, clown fish, sea urchins.Best snorkeling on Gili Air.

name: Meno Wall — Gili Meno
desc: Sheer wall with corals and large fish.For diving - one of the best sites.

name: Mad Monkey Bar
desc: Infinity pool on the beach, DJ, parties every night.Trivia Night, Music Quiz.The main party hub.

name: Sama Sama Reggae Bar
desc: Live reggae every evening, relaxed atmosphere, fire show.

name: Tir Na Nog Irish Bar
desc: Irish pub with live music.Pool parties, beer, sports broadcasts.

name: Jiggy Boat Party
desc: Party on a catamaran around the islands.Music, snorkeling, sunset.Book in advance!

name: Lucky\
desc: Chill bar on the beach, live music in the evenings, hammocks in the water.

name: H2O Yoga & Meditation
desc: Yoga on a floating platform in the ocean!A unique experience only on Gili Air.

name: Swing in water (Gili T)
desc: Iconic swing at sunset - THE photo of Gili.West Bank.

name: Underwater Statues (Gili Meno)
desc: Underwater photos with statues - better with a GoPro or underwater camera.Depth 4m.

name: Mount Rinjani Trek (3726m)
desc: The second highest volcano in Indonesia.The sunrise over the Segara Anak crater lake is one of the most beautiful views in Southeast Asia.Trekking 2-3 days with tents.

name: Senaru Crater Rim (2D1N)
desc: A shortened version - climbing to the edge of the crater in 2 days.Dawn at 2639m, view of the lake.Physically it’s easier.

name: Sembalun Hot Springs
desc: Hot springs at the foot of the volcano.After trekking - ideal for muscles.

name: Pink Beach (Tangsi Beach)
desc: Pink sand!One of the few pink beaches in the world.Corals color the sand.Snorkeling directly from the shore.

name: Kuta Lombok (Pantai Kuta)
desc: NOT Kuta in Bali!White sand, turquoise water, minimal people.The main tourist hub of the south of Lombok.

name: Tanjung Aan
desc: Two bays with different sand: one fine as flour, the other “pepper”.Turquoise water, hills.

name: Mawun Beach
desc: An ideal bay: calm water, white sand, almost empty on weekdays.

name: Selong Belanak
desc: A long white beach, gentle waves - ideal for beginner surfers.Board for rent from 50K/hour.

name: Desert Point (Bangko-Bangko)
desc: World class!Long left pipe.Only for experienced ones.One of the best spots in Indonesia.

name: Gerupuk Bay
desc: 5 spots in one bay!All levels.Boat access from 50K.

name: Ekas Bay
desc: Advanced left reef break.Fewer people than in Gerupuk.

name: Belongas Bay
desc: Hammerhead sharks!Serious diving for experienced ones.Strong currents, but incredible encounters.

name: South Gili Islands (Gili Nanggu, Gili Sudak)
desc: Small islands in the southwest.Clear water, turtles, few divers.

name: Saleh Bay, Sumbawa
desc: Whale sharks are the largest fish in the world, up to 12m!Swimming near fishing platforms (bagan) in the Gulf of Saleh.Snorkeling in calm waters.Season: March-November.

name: Kenza
desc: Stylish restaurant with excellent cuisine.Insta-interior, cocktails, seafood.

name: Bush Radio
desc: Cafe with excellent coffee and breakfast.Next to Kenza - can be combined.

name: The Well
desc: Healthy food, vegan options, smoothie bowls.Opened in 2024.

name: Cafe Alberto
desc: Beachfront with big bags, cocktails, sound of the ocean.The sunset here is magical.

name: Square Restaurant
desc: On the coast of Senggigi.Seafood, sunsets, tourist area.

name: Warung Menega
desc: Local cuisine, rendang, ayam bakar.For budget travelers.🍽 Worth a try: Nasi goreng or nasi champur

name: Mount Bromo Sunrise (Penanjakan viewpoint)
desc: Dawn over a sea of ​​sand, the Bromo crater smokes below, Martian landscapes all around.Departure at 2-3 am by jeep, dawn at 5:30.One of the most spectacular sunrises in the world.

name: Bromo Crater
desc: After dawn - descent into the “sea of ​​sand” in a jeep, climb the stairs (253 steps) to the smoking crater.Sulfur smell, incredible views.

name: Savanna Teletubbies Hill
desc: The green hills near Bromo are like something out of a cartoon.Photo shoot is a must!

name: Kawah Ijen Blue Fire
desc: The blue flame is burning sulfur gas, visible only in the dark.The ascent begins at 1-2 am (3 km up).Gas mask is required!Below is the largest acid lake in the world, turquoise in color.

name: Tumpak Sewu Waterfall
desc: “A Thousand Cascades” is a giant semicircular waterfall 120m high.Water falls from everywhere, like an amphitheater.One of the most impressive waterfalls in the world!

name: Descent to the foot
desc: The path down is steep and slippery (30-45 min).Below is a cave behind a waterfall, a rainbow in the spray.You will get completely wet!Coban Sewu (nearby) Another waterfall 10 minutes away.Thinner, but also beautiful.Can be combined

name: Borobudur Temple
desc: The largest Buddhist temple in the world (9th century).2672 bas-reliefs, 504 Buddha statues.The sunrise against the backdrop of volcanoes is unforgettable.UNESCO World Heritage.

name: Prambanan Temple
desc: The largest Hindu temple in Indonesia (9th century).The three main towers are dedicated to Shiva, Vishnu and Brahma.The height of the central temple is 47m.The sunset here is magical.

name: Malioboro Street
desc: The main pedestrian street of Yogyakarta - street food, souvenirs, batik, street musicians.In the evening there is a special atmosphere.

name: Kraton (Sultan's Palace)
desc: The current palace of the Sultan of Yogyakarta (XVIII century).Traditional Javanese architecture, gamelan orchestra, museum.

name: Taman Sari (Water Castle)
desc: Royal garden-pool of the 18th century.Underground tunnels, photogenic ruins, artificial lakes.In the morning there are fewer people.

name: Jomblang Cave
desc: A cave with a “ray of light” - a 60m descent on a rope, then an underground river and a canyon.The light comes through the hole in the ceiling - an incredible sight!Book in advance.

name: Mount Merapi Jeep Tour
desc: Jeep tour through the lava fields of the most active volcano in Indonesia.Ruins of villages covered with ashes in 2010. Adrenaline + views.

name: Dieng Plateau
desc: High mountain plateau (2000m) - colored lakes, ancient Hindu temples (8th century), geysers.Cold!Take your jacket.

name: Madakaripura Waterfall
desc: Hidden waterfall in a canyon near Bromo.You walk along the river between the rocks - water falls from everywhere.A mystical place associated with the legend of Gadja Mada.

name: Coban Rondo Waterfall
desc: Beautiful waterfall in the Malanga mountains (84m).Easy access, park around.Ideal on the way to/from Bromo.

name: Kedung Kayang Waterfall
desc: 40m waterfall with views of Merapi volcano in the background.Instagram paradise near Borobudur.

name: Klinik Kopi Yogyakarta
desc: Iconic coffee shop in Yogyakarta.Specialty coffee from different islands of Indonesia, hand roasted.Minimalism and atmosphere.🍽 Worth a try: Specialty coffee

name: Epic Coffee Yogyakarta
desc: Fashionable coffee shop with industrial design.Excellent flat white, breakfast, atmosphere for work.🍽 Worth a try: Specialty coffee

name: Gudeg Yu Djum
desc: The legendary gudeg is Yogyakarta's national dish made from young jackfruit.Operating since the 1950s.Sweetish, spicy, taste like nothing else.

name: Bale Raos (Kraton Restaurant)
desc: Restaurant at the Sultan's Palace - royal Javanese cuisine.Recipes from the Kraton kitchen.A unique experience.

name: Warung Sate Klatak Pak Pong
desc: Famous goat meat satay on coals.They fry on umbrella knitting needles - a unique local technique.

name: Tempo Gelato Malang
desc: Artisanal gelato in Malang.Unique flavors: durian, klengkeng, avocado.A beautiful coffee shop in a colonial building.🍽 Worth a try: Specialty coffee

name: Rawon Nguling (Surabaya)
desc: Ravon - black kluwak nut soup with beef.The main dish of Surabaya.This warung is one of the best.

name: Sewu Temple
desc: Buddhist temple complex near Prambanan (249 small temples).Almost no tourists - a contrast with its crowded neighbor.

name: Punthuk Setumbu Sunrise
desc: Hill near Borobudur - sunrise with a view of the temple, Merapi and Merbabu volcanoes.That very iconic shot!

name: Ashtari Restaurant & Yoga
desc: Restaurant on a hill with a panorama of Kuta bays.Healthy cuisine, smoothie bowls, fresh juices.Yoga classes in the morning.One of the best views in Lombok.

name: El Bazar Cafe & Restaurant
desc: Moroccan decor, cocktails, tapas.Romantic dinner in Kuta.Live music on weekends.

name: Munchies Kuta Lombok
desc: The best breakfasts in Kuta are smoothie bowls, avocado toast, excellent coffee.Cozy atmosphere, fast Wi-Fi.🍽 Worth a try: Specialty coffee

name: Milk Espresso Kuta
desc: Australian coffee shop - specialty coffee, pancakes, granola.Stylish minimalism.🍽 Worth a try: Specialty coffee

name: Knalpot Restaurant & Bar
desc: Craft beer + Asian fusion by the pool.Home-smoked swordfish is a hit.Best fine dining in Kuta.

name: Terra Kuta Lombok
desc: Vegan-friendly cafe.Jackfruit burger with coconut chips is a must try!Terrace and air conditioning.

name: Mama Pizza Lombok
desc: Authentic Italian pizza from a wood-fired oven.Truffle with mushrooms - top.The pasta and burrata are great too.🍽 Worth a try: Pasta of the day

name: Warung Sulawesi
desc: Authentic Indonesian cuisine - nasi champur, rendang, sambal.Budget-friendly and delicious, just like grandma's.🍽 Worth a try: Nasi goreng or nasi champur

name: Tanjung Aan Beach
desc: Turquoise bay with white “pepper” sand.Two beaches in one - calm and for surfing.One of the most beautiful beaches in Indonesia.

name: Mawun Beach
desc: A perfect crescent of a bay with turquoise water.Few people, excellent snorkeling around the edges.

name: Selong Belanak Beach
desc: The best beach for beginner surfers is long, gentle waves.White sand, board rental 50K/hour.

name: Kuta Lombok Surf School
desc: Surf lessons at Selong Belanak and Gerupuk Bay.Small groups, all levels.Board rental.

name: Bukit Merese Viewpoint
desc: Hill overlooking Tanjung Aan and the ocean.Best sunset in south Lombok.10 minutes rise.

name: Asmara Spa Senggigi
desc: Balinese massages and spa rituals in Senggigi.Ocean view, aromatherapy.

name: Cafe Alberto Lombok
desc: Beachfront cafe with big bags - cocktails, seafood, sunset.Relaxed atmosphere right on the sand.

name: Senggigi Beach
desc: The main beach of western Lombok.Sunsets overlooking Bali and Agung.Bars and restaurants along the shore.

name: Kenza Cafe Kuta Lombok
desc: Coffee shop-restaurant with a garden atmosphere.Mosaic decor, hummus, falafel, smoothie.Vegetarian menu.🍽 Worth a try: Specialty coffee

name: Night Market Gili Trawangan
desc: Night market - freshest grilled seafood, BBQ vegetables, rice.Live reggae music.Come before 20:00 or after 21:30.🍽 Worth a try: Nasi goreng or nasi champur

name: Wajan Sister Cafe
desc: Budget cafe with excellent Indonesian cuisine.Yellow chicken curry is legendary.Guacamole is also top.

name: The Banyan Tree Gili T
desc: Fine dining on Gili Trawangan - seafood, steaks, cocktails.Romantic atmosphere under a huge banyan tree.

name: Coffee and Thyme
desc: The best coffee on Gili T. Smoothie bowls, healthy breakfasts, fresh juices.Ideal in front of the beach.🍽 Worth a try: Specialty coffee

name: Gili Bliss Cafe
desc: The iconic smoothie bowls are so popular that they opened a second branch.Available on Gili Air and Gili T. 🍽 Worth a try: Specialty coffee

name: Casa Vintage Beach
desc: Boho restaurant on the beach with swings and hammocks.Pasta, pizza, fresh juices.Sunset from a beanbag is a dream.

name: Pomona Gili Meno
desc: New restaurant 2025 in Greek style on Gili Meno.Blue and white aesthetic, Mediterranean cuisine, sunset views.

name: PinkCoco Sunset Bar (Gili Air)
desc: Hotel bar right on the beach on the west coast of Gili Air.Best sunset on the island + happy hour 16:00-19:00.

name: Sama Sama Reggae Bar
desc: The main party bar of Gili T - live reggae music every evening, pub crawls, cocktails.

name: Juku Marlin Gili T
desc: The freshest grilled fish straight from the boat.Marlin, tuna, mahi-mahi.Simple presentation, divine taste.🍽 Worth a try: Grilled seafood

name: Yoga & Freediving Gili Air
desc: Yoga studios and freediving schools on Gili Air.Drop-in classes in the morning and evening.Vinyasa, hatha, yin.

name: Coco Cafe & Ice Cream Gili T
desc: Homemade ice cream and coffee.Coconut, mango, chocolate.Rescue in the heat.🍽 Worth a try: Specialty coffee

name: Acropora Bar & Restaurant
desc: Restaurant on a cliff above Mushroom Bay with bamboo architecture.Infinity pool, sunset over Agung, live music.Betutu Duck - must try.

name: Mambo Beach Restaurant
desc: Beachfront restaurant at the dive center.Beanbags on the sand, seafood, cocktails, fairy lights in the evening.Surfer fries are legendary.

name: Warnakali Restaurant
desc: The best fine dining in Penida is Fish Meunière, wakame tuna.Infinity pool, day bed.Book in advance.

name: Secret Penida Restaurant & Bar
desc: Hidden restaurant overlooking the ocean.International cuisine, cocktails, insta-location.The sunset from here is fire.

name: Penida Colada Beach Bar
desc: Ped Beach Bar - happy hour 16:00-19:00 (2 cocktails for the price of one).Live music, beach front.

name: Sushi Island Nusa Penida
desc: Japanese cuisine on the island - the freshest rolls, sashimi.Unexpectedly high quality for Penida.🍽 Worth a try: Set of rolls

name: Peguyangan Waterfall (Blue Stairs)
desc: 700 blue steps down to the sacred spring and temple by the ocean.Splashes of waves, temple on the rock.Not for the faint of heart!

name: Crystal Bay Snorkeling
desc: One of the best snorkeling spots in Bali.Crystal water, turtles, reef fish.Chance to see mola-mola (Aug-Oct)!

name: Gamat Bay Snorkeling
desc: Hidden bay with manta rays!Snorkeling with manta rays is the ultimate Penida experience.Season: Sep-Apr.Boat from Crystal Bay.

name: La Brisa (sunset) 🌅
desc: Recycled beach club overlooking Echo Beach.Swings over the pool, fire show, DJ.Come 1.5 hours before sunset - the best places are sold out quickly.

name: Echo Beach Sunset
desc: Black volcanic sand + golden sunset.Surfers in the sunset light - the best shot.Bars and warungs along the shore.

name: Tanah Lot Temple (sunset)
desc: Temple on a rock in the ocean - an iconic Bali sunset.Silhouette of the temple in golden light.Arrive 2 hours before sunset for a good spot.

name: Cafe Del Mar Bali (sunset)
desc: Elite beach club with a swimming pool on the shore.DJ sets, cocktails, paella.Sunset in Ibiza style.

name: Cretya Ubud (sunset) 🌅
desc: Infinity pool in a cave above the canyon of the Ayung River.Sunset over the jungle - golden light breaks through the palm trees.Book in advance!

name: Alas Harum Swing (golden hour)
desc: Swings over rice terraces in golden light.After 15:00 there is soft light and fewer queues.Luwak coffee included.

name: Campuhan Ridge Walk (sunset)
desc: A path along the ridge between two valleys.At sunset there is golden grass, volcanoes on the horizon.Quiet and magical.

name: Single Fin Uluwatu (sunset) 🌅
desc: Legendary rock bar overlooking the Uluwatu surf spot.Sunset here is a religion.Sunday sessions with DJ.Come by 16:00.

name: El Kabron Bali (sunset)
desc: Mediterranean restaurant on the cliff - 5-course dinner with wine at sunset.Swimming pool, dinner, Spanish cuisine.Reservation is required.

name: Banah Cliff Point
desc: Rocky cape with an arch over the ocean.Dramatic cliffs, photogenic bridge.Less popular than Kelingking.

name: Teletubbies Hill Nusa Penida
desc: Green hills overlooking Atuh Beach.Instagram paradise - the hills are bright green during the rainy season.On the way to Diamond Beach.

name: W Bali Seminyak
desc: 5-star on the beach.Swimming pool, DJ, restaurant, beach.Stylish and party.

name: Uluwatu Temple Kecak Dance (sunset)
desc: Temple on a 70-meter cliff + Kecak dance at sunset.50 men singing “chak-chak-chak” - gives me goosebumps.Starts at 18:00.

name: Ku De Ta (sunset) 🌅
desc: Seminyak's iconic beach club since 2000.Champagne, DJ, sunset over the ocean.Dress code smart casual.

name: Potato Head Beach Club (sunset)
desc: An architectural masterpiece of 4,000 shutters.Infinity pool, DJ, gastronomy.One of the best sunsets in Bali.

name: La Plancha Seminyak (sunset)
desc: Multi-colored beanbags on the beach.Cocktails, tapas.The most relaxed and budget-friendly sunset spot in Seminyak.

name: Sanur - sunrise on the beach 🌅
desc: Sanur is a place of SUNRISE, not sunset!The sun rises over Nusa Penida.Promenade, coffee in hand, jukung fishing boats.Come by 6:00.

name: Lovina Beach Sunset
desc: Quiet sunset over the Java Sea.Black sand, fishing boats, zero tourists.In the morning - dolphins.

name: Amed Sunset Point
desc: Sunset overlooking Agung - the volcano reflected in the sea in golden light.Quiet, no crowds.Jemeluk Bay is the best angle.

name: Sandat Glamping Tents
desc: Luxury glamping in Ubud.Tents with private pools, restaurant, spa.Tropical garden, silence.One of the best in the world.

name: Capella Ubud
desc: 22 luxury tents in the jungle by the river.Each with a swimming pool.Spa, restaurant with a chef.The best glamping in Asia.

name: Sang Giri Mountain Glamping
desc: Mountain glamping with forest and mountain views in the Jatiluwih area.Silence, stars, morning fog.

name: Bobocabin Ubud
desc: High-tech mini-cabins near the rice fields.Control of lights and air conditioning via the application.Budget and stylish.

name: Triyana Glamping Ubud
desc: Glamping tents in a tropical garden in Ubud.Breakfast, swimming pool, 30 minutes from the center.Quiet and cozy.

name: Glamping Lombok (Kuta)
desc: Bungalow tents in the Kuta hills overlooking the bays.Budget option in Lombok, close to the beaches.

name: Mirai Sushi
desc: Sushi rolls, sashimi, tempura.Japanese cuisine in a stylish interior.🍽 Worth a try: Set of rolls

name: Satoshi Izakaya
desc: Authentic izakaya: gyoza, yakitori, ramen, sake.Japanese atmosphere.🍽 Worth a try: Set of rolls

name: Sushimi Bali
desc: Fresh sushi and rolls.One of the best Japanese restaurants in Canggu.🍽 Worth a try: Set of rolls

name: Yuki Japanese Restaurant
desc: Japanese restaurant: sushi, ramen, donburi.Cozy atmosphere in Ubud.🍽 Worth a try: Set of rolls

name: Warung Oishi
desc: Japanese cuisine: rolls, ramen, udon.Popular with expats.🍽 Worth a try: Set of rolls

name: Rayjin Teppanyaki
desc: Teppanyaki show: the chef cooks right in front of you.Wagyu, lobster, Japanese theater.🍽 Worth a try: Set of rolls

name: Niku Bali
desc: Japanese grill: yakiniku, wagyu, ramen.Ocean view in Uluwatu.🍽 Worth a try: Set of rolls

name: Wok Me Up
desc: Asian wok: pad thai, fried rice, curry.Fast, cheap, tasty.🍽 Worth a try: Set of rolls

name: Thai Express Bali
desc: Tom yum, green curry, pad thai.Authentic Thai cuisine.🍽 Worth a try: Pad Thai

name: Taco Casa
desc: Japanese-Mexican fusion: sushi burritos, tempura tacos.Unusual and tasty.🍽 Worth a try: Taco

name: Fu Shou Noodle

name: P53G C29 Jero (cleaning and birds)
desc: The hidden gem of Bali is an authentic cafe at the local grandfather's place (Mangku).Exotic birds and animals live here, creating an incredible atmosphere of a lost world.The main feature: upon your request, grandfather can perform a real Balinese cleansing ritual (Melucat) for you right on the spot.This is a very intimate, deep and soulful experience away from the tourist crowds.📎 My advice: leave a generous donation, this place runs on the pure energy of the owner.

name: LONG PLAY CAFE (Pererenan)
desc: A unique intimate establishment in the quiet area of ​​Pererenan (Canggu) for aesthetes and music lovers.An ideal spot with All-Day breakfasts, specialty coffee and wine.The main feature: an amazing collection of vinyl records plays here all day long (you can hear everything from jazz to your favorite Deftones albums).Open from 8:00 am to 10:40 pm.📎 My advice: Come here in the evening for a glass of wine under the tube sound of vinyl - this is the best way to slow down after a noisy day.

name: Uchusen Bali (Spaceship Villa)
desc: Secret brutalist spaceship villa in the jungle of Pererenan (Canggu).A complete break from the mold: no thatched roofs or bamboo.Here you will find solid concrete, futuristic design, a glass ceiling directly below the pool (you can see people swimming from below) and a shower with a view of the sky.📎 My advice: An ideal rental option for those who are looking for cyberpunk aesthetics and want to live inside a modern art object.

name: Balay Villa (Cemagi)
desc: The hidden gem of Bali is a snow-white modern Mediterranean villa in a quiet area of ​​Chemagi (5 minutes from the beach).The ideal minimalist aesthetic: flowing arches, light, spacious interiors, flowing fabrics and a private pool.Ideal for photo shoots and 'slow life' away from the traffic jams of Canggu.

name: WOODS Bali (Pererenan)
desc: A restaurant in Pererenan (Canggu) that elevates the aesthetics of “quiet luxury” to the absolute level.The interior is made of solid wood, green velvet, marble tables and stunning wooden chandeliers.An ideal place for a leisurely, expensive dinner or an atmospheric brunch.There is often live jazz playing in the evenings.📎 My advice: book a table for the jazz evening in advance, it will be unforgettable.

name: Camaya Bali (Bamboo House)
desc: Legendary bamboo eco-houses, made famous throughout the world in the Netflix show 'World's Most Amazing Vacation Rentals'.Total fusion with nature (Selat, East Bali): four-poster bed, outdoor wooden deck with hanging net right above the endless rice terraces, and open-air stone bathtub.There is no schedule and no stress.Just you and the jungle.

name: Kamandalu Ubud Resort
desc: A legendary 5-star resort in the heart of the Ubud jungle, where people go for the most luxurious shots from Pinterest.True 'quiet luxury'.Famous for its giant mandala-shaped flower baths, floating breakfasts and private wooden boat where you can swim in a pond with hundreds of colorful koi carp.This is the case when the hotel is the main attraction of your vacation.

name: Genius Cafe Sanur
desc: Specialty coffee, good WiFi, quiet atmosphere for work.🍽 Worth a try: Matcha latte + cake

name: Ubud Zen River House
desc: A place of total grounding and zen calm.This villa's stunning circular wooden terrace hangs directly over the rushing river.Huge panoramic windows overlook the dense jungle of Ubud.An ideal spot to escape from the hustle and bustle, listen to the sound of water straight from the stone bath and disappear into the nature of the island.

name: Banyu Wana Amertha Waterfall
desc: The hidden gem of the North (Bedugul/Singaraja area).The uniqueness of the place is that the water here trickles right through the green wall of the jungle, creating hundreds of small cascades.There are 4 different waterfalls in one location!Very picturesque, gentle descent through coffee and clove plantations.Less touristy and incredibly cinematic.

name: Mahi Mahi Bingin (Boutique Stays)
desc: Boutique hotel on the cliffs of Bingin (Uluwatu) with that 'billion dollar view' of the ocean.This is the place where you will wake up to the sound of the surf and watch the most beautiful, bloody Balinese sunsets without getting out of bed.Aesthetic expensive minimalism, wooden details and panoramic floor-to-ceiling windows.The ocean is literally knocking on your door.An ideal spot for romance and 'quiet luxury' in Bukit.

name: Bingin Beach
desc: One of the most aesthetic and surfing beaches on the entire Bukit Peninsula.To get down to the turquoise water, you will have to overcome steep steps along a steep cliff.Authentic cafes, bars and white villas with wooden terraces reminiscent of Greece or Italian Amalfi are stuck right on this rock.📎 My advice: come here at sunset, sit on the balcony of any cafe with a coconut and enjoy the view of the surfers.

name: THAIKILA (Ubud)
desc: A stylish boutique of premium swimwear and resort wear in the center of Ubud.Minimalistic interior, bare concrete and a huge selection of aesthetic models that fit perfectly.This is a brand that creates pieces that fit perfectly into the vibe of a Balinese holiday.

name: Pison Ubud
desc: The famous Pison coffee shop in Ubud with a spacious terrace surrounded by rice fields.The interior combines warm wood, thatched roofs and modern comfort.An ideal place for a leisurely brunch overlooking the greenery.🍽 Worth a try: Be sure to order their signature Smoked salmon cream bagel and refreshing Espresso Matcha.

name: Donna (Ubud)
desc: Luxurious restaurant and cocktail bar for an evening out.Dim lighting, exquisite serving of food (fine dining) and a unique cocktail menu.The perfect spot to end your day in Ubud beautifully.📎 My advice: come here in the evening and be sure to try their signature Espresso Martini - it is one of the best on the island.

name: Jaens Spa (Ubud)
desc: A stunning spa with a deep focus on the aesthetics of relaxation.Spacious massage rooms are flooded with light thanks to huge round panoramic porthole windows overlooking the lush greenery of the jungle.After a 90-minute traditional Balinese massage, you can shower directly in the round marble bathtub next to the window.Complete reboot of body and thoughts.

name: VIP Helicopter Tour (Bali Heli)
desc: The absolute apogee of “heavy luxury” and romance in Bali.Flight by private helicopter (Bali Heli / Air Bali) over the breathtaking cliffs of Uluwatu, the giant statue of Garuda Vishnu and the turquoise ocean.This is the same experience that you will remember for the rest of your life.An ideal scenario for a marriage proposal or a birthday gift.📎 My advice: Book your flight strictly for the golden hour before sunset - the views will be simply cinematic.

name: Bali Fire Shooting Club (Sanur)
desc: The only licensed indoor shooting club in Bali, located in Sanur.A real, brutal experience with military weapons (pistols, rifles).Completely safe conditions, professional instructors and a huge arsenal to choose from.An ideal place to relieve stress, get a powerful dose of adrenaline and take brutal shots.📎 My advice: If you are tired of beaches and meditation, this is the best way to reset your nervous system and let off steam.

name: VIP Helicopter Flights (Canggu Helipad)
desc: The ultimate level of "quiet luxury" straight from Canggu.Take off in a private helicopter (Air Bali / Fly Bali) over the famous black volcanic sand beaches, soar over the surfers of Echo Beach and endless rice terraces at sunset.This is not just transport - it is an exclusive experience that will remain in your memory forever.📎 My advice: This is the most photogenic location in the world for shooting luxury content.Be sure to take a professional photographer or drone operator with you for the backstage areas.

name: Pahdi Specialty Coffee

name: Love Anchor
desc: Flea market on weekends

name: Deus Ex Machina
desc: The spirit of freedom, the smell of leather and motor oil.Moto + surf culture men's surf clothing $$$

name: Old Man\
desc: ⭐️ Majority's choice · Canggu Legend.Live music, beer (35K Bintang), party every night.Zero pathos.

name: The Avocado Factory
desc: The first Avocado Bar in Southeast Asia!In the rice fields of Canggu.Instagrammable place + healthy food.

name: Revolver Espresso
desc: ⭐️Most choice · Cult coffee shop in a side street.Best espresso in Seminyak.The queue is a sign of quality.🍽 Worth a try: Espresso in the alley

name: Earth Cafe & Market
desc: Vegetarian cafe + organic food store.Curry, bowls, juices.🍽 Worth a try: Raw bowl

name: Bali Boat Shed
desc: ⭐️Most choice · 500+ reviews.Beachwear, legendary facade - photo spot women's swimwear clothing $$$

name: La Favela
desc: Nightclub.ONLY AT NIGHT - the hottest dance floor!

name: Warung Mak Beng
desc: A Sanur legend since 1941!Only one dish - fried fish with rice.The queue is worth it.🍽 Worth a try: Fried fish with rice (legend!)

name: Bread Basket
desc: Cafe-bakery.Excellent pastries, coffee, breakfasts.There are also in Canggu and Uluwatu.

name: Casablanca Sanur
desc: Bar with live music.Cocktails, relaxed atmosphere.Lilla Pantai Beach bar on the promenade.Beer, sunset (well, almost), friendly crowd.For nightlife: Seminyak (30 min) or Kuta (20 min).Pasa

name: Museum Le Mayeur
desc: Colonial architecture, tropical garden by the sea.House of a Belgian artist.

name: Rumah Gemuk
desc: A unique restaurant in a glass house overlooking Lake Beratan and the Bedugul Mountains.Two floors + picnic area.

name: Munduk Escape
desc: A hidden gem in the village of Munduk.Cafe on family land overlooking the valley and mountains.Famous local coffee.

name: Nungnung Waterfall
desc: Powerful waterfall at an altitude of 900m."In the middle of nowhere."Steep staircase ~500 steps.Between Ubud and Bedugul.

name: Jatiluwih Rice Terraces
desc: UNESCO, huge terraces without crowds.

name: Pura Ulun Danu Beratan
desc: The iconic “floating” temple on Lake Beratan is a symbol of Bali (on the 50,000 IDR note).Stunning at dawn.

name: Batur Natural Hot Spring
desc: Hot springs right on the shore of Lake Batur.Simpler and cheaper than Toya Devasya, but also volcanic water.There is a pool overlooking the volcano.

name: Warung Made Penida
desc: Homemade Balinese cuisine.Nasi Champur with sea view.Local prices.🍽 Worth a try: Nasi goreng or nasi champur

name: Crystal Bay
desc: Mola mola (ocean sunfish) from July to October!Crystal visibility, currents.

name: In Da Lodge Hostel
desc: Best hostel in Ubud.Clean, pool, good atmosphere.

name: The Chill Penida
desc: Infinity pool overlooking algae fields.Tacos, omelettes, shisha.DJ on full moons.No minimum.

name: Penida Espresso
desc: Coffee shop in the center of Penida - specialty coffee, light breakfasts.Good Wi-Fi, air conditioning.🍽 Worth a try: Specialty coffee

name: Moana Fish Eatery
desc: Japanese fish bar: poke bowls, sashimi, tempura.Seafood + Japanese cuisine.🍽 Worth a try: Fish & chips

name: Pepito Supermarket
desc: The main supermarket for expats.Imported products, wine, cheeses, meat.Several locations: Canggu, Seminyak, Ubud.

name: COMO Shambhala Estate
desc: ⭐️Most choice · Ultra-luxe wellness resort in the jungle.Yoga, Ayurveda, spa.World level.

name: The Legian Seminyak
desc: Classic suite right on the beach.All inclusive: spa, restaurants, swimming pool.

name: Munduk Moding Plantation
desc: Luxury eco-resort on a coffee plantation.Infinity pool above the clouds!

name: Lola\
desc: Mexican restaurant: tacos, burritos, nachos, margaritas.Vibrant atmosphere.🍽 Worth a try: Taco

name: Parigata Villas Resort
desc: Villas with pool in a tropical garden.Quiet, spa, close to the beach.

name: Mavammy Canggu
desc: Cozy cafe in Canggu.Breakfast all day, pancakes, eggs Benedict, lattes.🍽 Worth a try: Eggs Benedict

name: Penny Lane Canggu
desc: A cafe with a retro vibe.Pancakes, burgers, cocktails.Beatles on the walls, surf atmosphere.🍽 Worth a try: Eggs Benedict

name: Sage Ubud
desc: Farm-to-table cafe.Organic salads, bowls, fresh juices from our own garden.🍽 Worth a try: Healthy bowl

name: Warung Biah Biah Ubud
desc: Authentic warung right in the center.Nasi champur for 25K - just like grandma's.🍽 Worth a try: Nasi goreng or nasi champur

name: Ji Restaurant Ubud
desc: French-Asian fusion.Duck, seafood, tasting sets.Romantic dinner.🍽 Worth a try: Croissant

name: Leke Leke Waterfall
desc: The most graceful, subtle and photogenic waterfall (often found on Pinterest).A narrow stream of water falls into a hidden cave, beautifully framed by ferns and bamboo.Trekking to it is very easy and pleasant (about 15 minutes along a well-maintained path).An ideal location for those who want beautiful shots without strenuous physical activity.

name: Pecatu Shooting Club Bali
desc: Premium shooting club in Bukit (Pechatu area).The perfect way to let off steam and get an adrenaline rush in an eco-friendly way after relaxing days in the villa.A huge safe area with many training areas (11-13 bay) and professional instructors.Shooting from real military weapons is available.📎 My advice: If you have never held a weapon in your hands, do not be afraid, instructors work even with beginners.
